features.name: Writer Page and Integrity Signals
features.description: Main editor page with title/subtitle, WPM tracking, paste detection, focus mode, and export actions.

features.name: Rich Text Editor
features.description: TipTap-based editor with formatting tools, headings, lists, images, alignment, and test automation hooks for paste/image/content injection.

features.name: DOCX and PDF Export Flow
features.description: Client-side DOCX generation and server-side DOCX-to-PDF conversion.

features.name: Spotify Playback Integration
features.description: Spotify OAuth, Web Playback SDK controls, playlists and track handling.

features.name: Landing and Login
features.description: Public landing and login flow that routes users to the editor.

features.name: Streamlit Prototype Backend
features.description: Prototype auth, editor, dashboard, and database flows.
